src_raw: In 2021, the pandemic entered its second year unabated: global supply chains were disrupted, inflation pressures were on the rise, risk of premature tightening of global financial conditions increased.  Adding to the unpredictability were the emergence of mutant variants of COVID-19 and the intensification of geopolitical tensions.  Despite such a macro environment filled with uncertainties, we continued to safeguard monetary and financial stability and maintain operational resilience.
mt_raw: 2021年，疫情進入第二年，依然未見緩和：全球供應鏈受阻，通脹壓力上升，全球金融環境過早收緊的風險增加。新冠病毒變異株的出現及地緣政治緊張局勢加劇，更增添了不確定性。在這充滿不確定性的宏觀環境下，我們繼續維護貨幣及金融穩定，並保持營運韌性。

src_raw: 2021 also brought hope for recovery with the successful rollout of COVID-19 vaccines together with the accommodative monetary and fiscal policies introduced in multiple economies.  The global economy began to recover from the severe contraction in 2020.  Locally, after having endured economic contraction in 2019 and 2020, the Hong Kong economy grew by 6.3% in 2021, thanks to the rollout of the vaccination programme and the Government’s pandemic relief measures which have lent crucial support to our economic recovery.
mt_raw: 2021年亦因新冠疫苗的成功推出，以及多個經濟體實施寬鬆的貨幣及財政政策，為復甦帶來希望。全球經濟開始從2020年的嚴重收縮中復甦。本地方面，香港經濟在2019及2020年經歷收縮後，於2021年增長6.3%，這有賴疫苗接種計劃的推行及政府推出的抗疫紓困措施，為經濟復甦提供了關鍵支持。

src_raw: With financial and monetary stability maintained, as well as a steadying macro environment, 2021 gave us some room to pursue more development work.  We seized the opportunity and pressed ahead with developmental initiatives that will help our financial sector remain highly competitive. Significant progress has been made across our three strategic priorities, namely fintech, green finance and Mainland market opportunities arising from Hong Kong’s gateway role.
mt_raw: 隨著金融及貨幣穩定得以維持，宏觀環境趨於穩定，2021年為我們爭取了更多發展空間。我們把握機遇，積極推進有助金融業保持高度競爭力的發展項目。在三大策略重點——金融科技、綠色金融及香港作為內地市場門戶所帶來的機遇——方面均取得重大進展。

src_raw: As we entered 2022, the global environment took a turn for the worse.  But as the saying goes, when the going gets tough, the tough get going.  We will continue to be proactive and pursue our developmental goals and priorities to be better prepared for the next challenge and to cement our status as an international financial centre.  We will also remain steadfast in our commitment to ensure the soundness of Hong Kong monetary and financial systems, as we have risen to the many challenges time and again as in the past.
mt_raw: 踏入2022年，全球環境轉趨嚴峻。但正如俗語所說，「艱難時刻，堅強者挺身而出」。我們將繼續積極主動，推進發展目標和重點工作，為迎接下一個挑戰做好更充分準備，並鞏固香港作為國際金融中心的地位。我們亦會堅守承諾，確保香港貨幣及金融體系的穩健，正如過去多次一樣，迎難而上。

src_raw: Since its establishment in 1983, the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) has been a strong anchor of Hong Kong’s financial system and has helped Hong Kong withstand numerous shocks and challenges.  Despite the lingering uncertainties surrounding the COVID-19 pandemic and market concerns about the pace of US monetary tightening, the Hong Kong dollar exchange and money markets continued to function in an orderly manner throughout the year, reflecting the robustness of the LERS.
mt_raw: 自1983年設立以來，聯繫匯率制度一直是香港金融體系的堅實錨點，協助香港抵禦多次衝擊與挑戰。儘管新冠疫情持續帶來不確定性，市場亦關注美國貨幣政策收緊的步伐，港元匯率及貨幣市場全年運作有序，反映聯繫匯率制度的穩健。

src_raw: This confidence in our systems did not happen overnight, but is based on the solid foundation which has been built up over the years.  In its 2021 External Sector Report, the International Monetary Fund once again reiterated that the credibility of the LERS has been assured by a transparent set of rules, ample fiscal and foreign reserves, strong financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy, and a prudent fiscal framework.
mt_raw: 我們對體系的信心並非一蹴而就，而是多年來累積的堅實基礎所致。國際貨幣基金組織於2021年《外部部門報告》中再次重申，聯繫匯率制度的公信力有賴於透明的規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、強而有力的金融監管與監察、靈活的經濟體系，以及審慎的財政框架。

src_raw: The robustness of the banking system is of paramount importance to financial stability in Hong Kong.  Two years into the COVID-19 pandemic, our banks remained resilient with liquidity positions and capitalisation faring very well by international standards.  As at end-2021, the capital adequacy ratio of local banks stood at 20.2%, well above the minimum requirement of 8%, while the average Liquidity Coverage Ratio of large banks was 151.9% in the fourth quarter of 2021, also well above the statutory minimum requirement of 100%.  Despite a challenging credit landscape amid the pandemic, the asset quality of the banking sector remained largely stable during the year. The classified loan ratio of the industry was 0.88% at the end of 2021, down from 0.90% at the end of 2020, well below the long-run historical average of 1.8% since 2000.
mt_raw: 銀行體系的穩健對香港金融穩定至關重要。新冠疫情持續兩年，本港銀行依然保持韌性，流動性及資本充足程度均達國際高標準。截至2021年底，本地銀行的資本充足比率為20.2%，遠高於8%的最低要求；大型銀行於2021年第四季的平均流動性覆蓋比率為151.9%，同樣遠高於100%的法定最低要求。儘管疫情下信貸環境充滿挑戰，銀行業資產質素全年大致穩定。2021年底業界分類貸款比率為0.88%，較2020年底的0.90%為低，遠低於自2000年以來1.8%的長期歷史平均水平。

terms: {'covid - 19': '新冠病毒', 'credit risk': '信用風險', 'hkma': '金管局', 'ppphs': '預先批核還息不還本計劃', 'corporate customer': '企業客戶', 'economic sector': '行業', 'individual borrower': '個人客戶', 'loan principal payment': '貸款本金', 'pandemic': '疫情', 'pillar of support': '經濟支柱', 'real economy': '實體經濟', 'relief measure': '紓困措施', 'supervisory work': '監管工作'}
src_raw: As always, the banking sector is an important pillar of support to economic activity.  This is ever more crucial in the face of economic fallout from the COVID-19 outbreak.  In the past year, a main challenge was to strike a balance between managing credit risk in the banking sector and maintaining the sector’s support for the real economy.  With our supervisory work over the years, banks continued to manage credit risks effectively.  At the same time, we worked closely with banks to provide the much needed relief to corporate and personal customers through the Pre-approved Principal Payment Holiday Scheme (PPPHS) and other relief measures.  The PPPHS, launched together with the Banking Sector Small and Medium-sized Enterprise (SME) Lending Coordination Mechanism in 2020 allowing eligible corporate customers to defer loan principal payments by six months on a pre-approval basis, was again further extended twice during 2021 until April 2022 recognising that some economic sectors were still hard-pressed by the lingering pandemic and were in need of continued credit relief.  Subsequently, in light of a resurgence of local coronavirus infections, in February 2022, the PPPHS was further extended until the end of October 2022.  It is encouraging to see that the banking sector has joined forces with the HKMA to help relieve cash-flow pressures on corporate and individual borrowers, even whilst the sector itself is experiencing its own difficult operating conditions due to the outbreak of the pandemic.
mt_raw: 銀行業一如既往是經濟活動的重要支柱。在新冠疫情帶來的經濟衝擊下，這一點尤為重要。過去一年，主要挑戰在於如何在管理銀行業信貸風險與維持對實體經濟支持之間取得平衡。憑藉多年來的監管工作，銀行繼續有效管理信貸風險。同時，我們與銀行緊密合作，透過「預先批核還息不還本」計劃（PPPHS）及其他紓困措施，為企業及個人客戶提供所需支援。PPPHS於2020年與銀行業中小企貸款協調機制一同推出，讓合資格企業客戶可預先獲批延遲六個月償還貸款本金。鑑於部分行業仍受疫情困擾，急需持續信貸支援，該計劃於2021年再度兩度延長至2022年4月。其後，因本地疫情反彈，PPPHS於2022年2月再延長至2022年10月底。令人鼓舞的是，銀行業與金管局攜手合作，協助企業及個人借款人紓緩現金流壓力，即使銀行業本身亦因疫情爆發而面對經營困難。

src_raw: Apart from the challenging credit landscape, the pandemic also brought about a more difficult operating environment and a digital landscape with escalating cyber threat. We have stepped up our efforts to enhance operational and cyber resilience of the banking sector, as well as consumer and investor protection amid increasing digitalisation and a surge in phishing scams.  In particular, the Code of Banking Practice was revised to enhance consumer protection in digital financial services.
mt_raw: 除了信貸環境充滿挑戰外，疫情亦帶來更艱難的營運環境及數碼化下日益嚴峻的網絡威脅。我們加強提升銀行業的營運及網絡韌性，並在數碼化加速及網絡釣魚詐騙激增下，強化消費者及投資者保障。特別是《銀行業務守則》已作出修訂，以加強數碼金融服務的消費者保障。

src_raw: Besides supervisory work, we are dedicated to promoting financial inclusion and customer-centric culture in the banking sector.  Enhancing accessibility to banking services by customers in need has been one of our priority areas and we have been working closely with the industry to develop industry guidelines.  Further to the guidance on barrier-free banking services and provision of banking services for persons with intellectual disabilities, the industry, with the support of the HKMA, published in December 2021 a guideline to set out the principles and good practices for the banking industry in providing banking services to persons with dementia and customers in need.
mt_raw: 除了監管工作外，我們亦致力推動銀行業的金融共融及以客為本文化。提升有需要客戶獲取銀行服務的便利性是我們的重點工作之一，並與業界緊密合作制定行業指引。繼早前就無障礙銀行服務及為智障人士提供銀行服務發出指引後，業界在金管局支持下，於2021年12月發表指引，闡述銀行業為認知障礙症人士及有需要客戶提供銀行服務的原則及良好做法。

terms: {'connecting talent to the future': '連接人才與未來', 'enhanced competency framework': '銀行專業資歷架構', 'fintech': '金融科技', 'fintech module': '金融科技新單元', 'future banking bridging programme': '銀行業銜接課程', 'hkma': '金管局', 'hong kong institute of bankers': '香港銀行學會', 'the hong kong institute of bankers': '香港銀行學會', 'banking industry': '銀行業', 'banking practitioner': '銀行從業員', 'holistic talent development strategy': '全面人才發展策略', 'outreach and promotional campaign': '推廣及宣傳活動', 'talent development strategy': '人才發展策略'}
src_raw: To support the continued development of the banking sector in the future where the new growth opportunities and challenges require a new set of skills from the workforce, the HKMA has formulated a holistic talent development strategy — “Connecting Talent to the Future” — to groom future talent and upskill existing practitioners in a more systematic and targeted manner.  Our new strategy is built on three “connect” directions: connecting students to the banking industry, connecting practitioners to the future of banking, and connecting the key stakeholders together to enhance collaboration in implementing the strategy.  We have launched a series of outreach and promotional campaigns to attract more students to enter the banking industry. To better prepare university students to be “future ready”, we have launched the Future Banking Bridging Programme jointly with the Hong Kong Institute of Bankers, which comprises a series of courses that cover practical banking knowledge and useful soft skills that are highly in demand in the banking industry.  For the existing banking practitioners, we have been working closely with the industry on developing opportunities for upskilling through providing more in-demand training programmes.  In December 2021, the new Fintech module under the Enhanced Competency Framework for banking practitioners was launched.
mt_raw: 為支持銀行業未來持續發展，因應新增長機遇與挑戰對從業人員提出的新技能要求，香港金融管理局（HKMA）已制定一套全面的人才發展策略——「連繫人才，邁向未來」，以更有系統及針對性的方式培育未來人才並提升現有從業員的技能。我們的新策略建立在三個「連繫」方向之上：連繫學生與銀行業、連繫從業員與銀行業的未來，以及連繫主要持份者以加強協作，共同推動策略落實。我們已推出一系列外展及推廣活動，吸引更多學生投身銀行業。為使大學生更好地「迎接未來」，我們與香港銀行學會合作推出「未來銀行橋樑計劃」，涵蓋一系列實用銀行知識及銀行業高度需求的軟技能課程。針對現有銀行從業員，我們亦與業界緊密合作，提供更多切合市場需求的培訓課程，協助其提升技能。2021年12月，銀行從業員專業能力提升架構下的新「金融科技」單元正式推出。

src_raw: The competitiveness of Hong Kong as an international financial centre is underpinned by the unparalleled access to opportunities it offers.  There is general consensus that global fintech adoption, opening-up of Mainland’s financial markets, and the mainstreaming of green and sustainable finance present huge opportunities for the future development of Hong Kong’s financial sector.  At the HKMA, we have dedicated substantial efforts in leveraging Hong Kong’s unique edge to capture these opportunities.  Let me talk about the fintech and Mainland opportunities first.
mt_raw: 香港作為國際金融中心的競爭力，正是建立於其無可比擬的機遇優勢之上。普遍認同，全球金融科技的普及、內地金融市場的進一步開放，以及綠色和可持續金融的主流化，為香港金融業未來發展帶來巨大機遇。金管局一直致力發揮香港的獨特優勢，把握這些機遇。以下我先談談金融科技及內地相關的機遇。

src_raw: This vision has driven us to formulate a new strategy, “Fintech 2025”, which was unveiled in June 2021.  As its name suggests, it aspires to help the financial sector adopt technology comprehensively by 2025.  The strategy comprises five focus areas which cover the required elements to achieve a successful ecosystem, and also the right factors for the ecosystem to grow further in a virtuous cycle. The first two parts of the strategy, namely “all banks go fintech” and “future-proofing Hong Kong for Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs)” mainly sought to create more demand for fintech adoption.  The other parts of the strategy relate to data, infrastructure, talent and funding, which are vital to the growth of the ecosystem.
mt_raw: 這一願景推動我們制定了新策略「金融科技2025」，於2021年6月公布。顧名思義，該策略旨在協助金融業於2025年前全面採用科技。策略涵蓋五大重點範疇，既包括建構成功生態圈所需的要素，也包括推動生態圈持續良性循環發展的關鍵因素。策略首兩部分——「全行金融科技化」及「為中央銀行數字貨幣（CBDC）未來做好準備」——主要著眼於創造更多金融科技應用需求。其餘部分則涵蓋數據、基礎設施、人才及資金，這些均是生態圈發展的關鍵。

src_raw: Under this strategy, a number of new initiatives were introduced, such as the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA) fintech pilot trial facility which allows financial institutions and technology firms to conduct pilot trials and obtain early feedback from regulators and users on their cross-boundary fintech initiatives, and the pilot launch of the Commercial Data Interchange which leverages the use of alternative data to facilitate SME financing.  We have also stepped up research on the application of wholesale CBDC to cross-border payments, and explored the prospect of e-HKD, which will increase Hong Kong’s readiness in terms of adopting CBDCs and in turn future-proof our city’s financial infrastructure in the decades ahead.
mt_raw: 在此策略下，我們推出多項新舉措，包括粵港澳大灣區金融科技試點測試平台，讓金融機構及科技公司就跨境金融科技項目進行試點測試，並及早獲取監管機構及用戶的反饋；以及商業數據通的試點推出，利用替代數據促進中小企融資。我們亦加強對批發型CBDC於跨境支付應用的研究，並探討電子港元（e-HKD）的前景，進一步提升香港在採用CBDC方面的準備，從而為未來數十年本地金融基礎設施的「未來適應」打下基礎。

src_raw: While we capitalise on the new opportunities presented by technological advancement, we also continue to build on our existing achievements as well as watch out for new risks that may arise.  For example, the Faster Payment System (FPS) introduced in 2018 has grown rapidly over the years, with the number of registrations reaching 9.6 million at the end of 2021, up 40% year on year.  The average daily turnover also increased 90% from 2020, reaching about 673,000 real-time transactions in 2021.  Meanwhile, in view of the rapid development of crypto-assets particularly payment-related stablecoins, we have issued a discussion paper earlier this year to invite market feedback on the development of an appropriate regulatory framework.
mt_raw: 在把握科技進步帶來新機遇的同時，我們亦持續鞏固既有成果，並密切關注可能出現的新風險。例如，2018年推出的「轉數快」（FPS）系統近年發展迅速，截至2021年底登記用戶數達960萬，按年增長40%。日均交易量亦較2020年上升90%，2021年達到約67.3萬宗即時交易。與此同時，鑑於加密資產（特別是支付相關穩定幣）迅速發展，我們於今年初發表諮詢文件，邀請市場就建立合適監管框架提供意見。

src_raw: Hong Kong has always played a strategic role in linking the Mainland market with international financial markets, providing international investors with a familiar regime and platform to conduct various kinds of financial, investment and wealth management activities.  The National 14th Five-Year Plan strengthens Hong Kong’s position as an international financial centre, a global offshore renminbi business hub, as well as asset management and risk management centres. This together with global economic trends has reinforced our conviction that Hong Kong should continue to enhance its unique value as a bridge connecting the Mainland and international markets.
mt_raw: 香港一直在連接內地市場與國際金融市場方面發揮戰略性角色，為國際投資者提供熟悉的制度和平台，進行各類金融、投資及財富管理活動。《國家「十四五」規劃綱要》進一步強化了香港作為國際金融中心、全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐，以及資產管理和風險管理中心的地位。這些因素，加上全球經濟趨勢，更加堅定我們的信念：香港應繼續發揮連接內地與國際市場的獨特橋樑價值。

src_raw: In 2021, we reached a milestone in enhancing connectivity, adding two new members to our family of Connect schemes, namely the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect (Cross-boundary WMC) Scheme in the GBA, and Southbound Trading under Bond Connect, essentially completing the two-way loop of mutual access in a wide spectrum of financial markets including equities, debts and wealth management.  The launch of the two schemes will bring new opportunities for Hong Kong in various aspects. By meeting the increasing diversification needs of Mainland investors, the two schemes will enlarge the customer base of our bond market and wealth management industry.  I am pleased to see that these two schemes have been operating smoothly.  The HKMA will continue to engage the Mainland authorities to further enhance these schemes over time.
mt_raw: 2021年，我們在促進互聯互通方面取得重要里程碑，為「互聯互通」機制增添兩名新成員，分別是大灣區「跨境理財通」及「債券通」下的南向通，基本上完成了涵蓋股票、債券及財富管理等多元金融市場的雙向互通循環。這兩項新機制的推出，將為香港帶來多方面新機遇。隨著內地投資者多元化需求日益增加，這兩項機制將擴大本港債券市場及財富管理行業的客戶基礎。我很高興見到這兩項機制運作順暢。金管局將繼續與內地有關部門保持溝通，進一步完善相關機制。

src_raw: Global and local conditions deteriorated notably entering 2022. On the one hand, the escalation of the Ukraine situation and expectations of rate hikes by the US Federal Reserve triggered market volatility. On the other hand, the local economy took a hit from the new wave of COVID-19 pandemic. That said, Hong Kong’s financial system remains well-positioned to withstand adverse shocks given its resilience and buffers built up over the years. Looking ahead, the HKMA will continue to attach high importance to safeguarding monetary and financial stability. In doing so, we will endeavour to stay ahead of the curve by identifying emerging risks and responding to them in an agile manner. At the same time, the HKMA will seek opportunities that would help bolster Hong Kong’s status as a leading international financial centre. In managing the Exchange Fund in this complicated investment environment, the HKMA will continue to invest prudently, while remaining flexible, implementing defensive measures as appropriate, and maintaining a high degree of liquidity.
mt_raw: 進入2022年，全球及本地形勢明顯惡化。一方面，烏克蘭局勢升級及市場對美國聯邦儲備局加息的預期，引發了市場波動。另一方面，本地經濟亦因新一波2019冠狀病毒病疫情而受到衝擊。儘管如此，香港金融體系多年來建立的韌性及緩衝，令其有能力承受不利衝擊。展望未來，香港金融管理局（HKMA）將繼續高度重視維護貨幣及金融穩定。在此過程中，我們將致力於預先識別新興風險，並以靈活敏捷的方式作出應對，力求領先於風險發展。同時，金管局亦會積極尋找有助鞏固香港作為國際金融中心地位的機遇。在這個複雜的投資環境下管理外匯基金時，金管局將繼續審慎投資，保持靈活性，按需要實施防禦性措施，並維持高度流動性。

src_raw: The global economic outlook remains subject to significant uncertainties.  The HKMA will keep abreast of latest developments and stay vigilant against potential risks, with the aim of upholding the resilience and stability of the financial system, which are essential for the ongoing provision of critical financial services that support the functioning of the Hong Kong economy.

src_raw: Looking ahead, markets may be subject to heightened volatilities amid increased uncertainties on various fronts. On the one hand, the US Federal Reserve’s monetary policy normalisation, if continuing at a fast pace, may tighten global financial conditions visibly ahead and increase the global debt-servicing burden.  On the other hand, following the escalation of the Ukraine situation in early 2022, geopolitical uncertainties including the China–US tension may continue to stay high and trigger bouts of financial market volatility again.  Last but not least, with the evolving pandemic developments, there might be a potential downside scenario where lockdowns were to be re-imposed at a large scale, leading to persistent global supply bottlenecks and adversely affecting global growth and inflation.  Having said that, Hong Kong’s financial system is well-positioned to withstand adverse shocks given the resilience and buffers built up over the years.  The HKMA also has the capability, resources and commitment to safeguard Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.
mt_raw: 展望未來，市場或會因多方面不確定性上升而出現更大波動。一方面，若美國聯邦儲備局貨幣政策正常化步伐加快，全球金融狀況或會明顯收緊，並增加全球債務償還負擔。另一方面，隨著2022年初烏克蘭局勢升級，中美緊張等地緣政治不確定性或將持續高企，並再次引發金融市場波動。最後，隨著疫情發展變化，若大規模重新實施封鎖措施，可能出現全球供應鏈持續瓶頸，對全球增長及通脹造成不利影響。儘管如此，香港金融體系多年來建立的韌性及緩衝，令其有能力承受不利衝擊。金管局亦具備能力、資源及決心，維護香港的貨幣及金融穩定。

Research programmes in 2022 will study issues affecting the Hong Kong economy and assess their potential risks. src_raw: As developed markets tighten monetary policies and the impact of the pandemic lingers, the credit landscape facing the banking sector is expected to remain challenging. At the same time, rapid technological advancement and digitalisation present both opportunities and challenges to the banking sector.  Facing an ever-changing financial landscape, the HKMA strives to ensure banks’ ability to withstand shocks through its ongoing supervisory efforts. At the same time, the HKMA will also continue to enhance and refine its banking supervisory and regulatory frameworks and policies, taking into account international standards and best practices.
mt_raw: 隨著已發展市場收緊貨幣政策及疫情影響持續，銀行業面臨的信貸環境預期仍具挑戰性。同時，科技迅速發展及數碼化亦為銀行業帶來機遇與挑戰。面對不斷變化的金融環境，金管局致力透過持續的監管工作，確保銀行有能力承受衝擊。同時，金管局亦會繼續完善及優化銀行監管及規管框架和政策，並參考國際標準及最佳做法。

src_raw: With the issuance of the new Supervisory Policy Manual (SPM) module on “Operational Resilience” in May 2022, the HKMA will continue to engage the industry and understand authorized institutions’ (AIs’) progress in developing their operational resilience frameworks.  In parallel, the HKMA will seek to raise the banking sector’s cyber resilience by following up with AIs on issues revealed by the assessments under the Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework 2.0 and monitoring AIs’ implementation of secure tertiary data backup.  Another key supervisory focus will be evaluating and addressing the risks from AIs’ growing dependency on technology service providers.
mt_raw: 隨著2022年5月新發佈的《監管政策手冊》有關「營運韌性」的章節，金管局將繼續與業界交流，了解認可機構（AIs）在建立營運韌性框架方面的進展。同時，金管局將透過跟進認可機構在「網絡韌性評估框架2.0」下發現的問題，以及監察其安全的第三層數據備份實施情況，進一步提升銀行業的網絡韌性。另一個監管重點是評估及應對認可機構對科技服務供應商依賴日益增加所帶來的風險。

src_raw: In 2022, the HKMA’s work on anti-money laundering and counter-financing of terrorism (AML/CFT) will continue to focus on strengthening response to fraud and financial crime through collaboration and information sharing, pursuing closer co-operation with various stakeholders in the AML/CFT ecosystem.  Other priorities are to implement a wider range of risk-sensitive supervisory techniques, by leveraging enhanced data and supervisory technology (Suptech) capabilities, and promote the use of Regtech by banks, including transaction monitoring systems.
mt_raw: 2022年，金管局在反洗錢及打擊恐怖分子資金籌集（AML/CFT）方面的工作，將繼續聚焦於通過協作及資訊共享，加強對詐騙及金融罪行的應對，並與AML/CFT生態圈內各持份者加強合作。其他重點包括運用增強的數據及監管科技（Suptech）能力，實施更廣泛的風險為本監管技術，並推動銀行採用監管科技（Regtech），包括交易監察系統。

src_raw: The HKMA will also keep working closely with the Government, the banking and stored value facility (SVF) sectors to publish an updated Hong Kong money laundering and terrorist financing risk assessment, and assist the industry in combatting new and emerging risks.  Work will also continue on understanding evolving money laundering and terrorist financing risks, implementing changes to AML law and related guidance to align with international standards, and maintaining proactive engagement with other regulators and international standard setters.
mt_raw: 金管局亦會繼續與政府、銀行及儲值支付工具（SVF）行業緊密合作，發布更新版的香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估，協助業界應對新興風險。相關工作還包括了解不斷演變的洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險，實施反洗錢法律及相關指引的變更，以符合國際標準，並與其他監管機構及國際標準制定者保持主動聯繫。

src_raw: In 2022, the HKMA will carry out on-site examinations and off-site surveillance of AIs’ conduct in relation to wealth management and the selling of securities, mandatory provident fund (MPF) and other investment and insurance products, with a focus on the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect (Cross-boundary WMC) Scheme in the Guangdong–Hong Kong–Macao Greater Bay Area, digital advisory platforms, complex products, virtual assets and non-investment-linked long term insurance products.
mt_raw: 2022年，金管局將就認可機構在財富管理及銷售證券、強積金（MPF）及其他投資和保險產品方面的行為，進行現場檢查及非現場監察，重點包括粵港澳大灣區跨境理財通（Cross-boundary WMC）計劃、數碼理財平台、複雜產品、虛擬資產及非投資相連長期保險產品。

src_raw: While maintaining close communication with other regulators and the banking industry, the HKMA will provide further guidance on regulatory standards in relation to the sale of investment, insurance and MPF products.  This will cover, among other things, investment services related to virtual assets and the selling of Protection Linked Plans, a new subset of investment-linked assurance scheme products with high level of insurance protection.  The HKMA, the Insurance Authority and the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority will jointly launch a mystery shopping programme on the selling practices of intermediaries in respect of Qualifying Deferred Annuity Policies and Tax-deductible Voluntary Contributions.

src_raw: The HKMA will continue to promote the safety and efficiency of the financial market infrastructures (FMIs) under its oversight, in accordance with the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (PSSVFO), the Principles for Financial Market Infrastructures (PFMI)1, and the various guidances issued by the Committee on Payments and Market Infrastructures (CPMI).  It will fine-tune the FMI oversight framework taking into account the latest technological and market developments.
mt_raw: 金管局將繼續根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（PSSVFO）、《金融市場基礎設施原則》（PFMI）1，以及支付與市場基礎設施委員會（CPMI）發佈的各項指引，促進其監管下金融市場基礎設施（FMIs）的安全與效率。金管局亦會因應最新科技及市場發展，進一步優化FMIs的監管框架。

src_raw: The HKMA will work with the FMIs on their observance of the PFMI, conducting and updating assessments as appropriate. The HKMA will also participate in the work of international standard setting bodies and strengthen its oversight requirements in response to market and technology developments and in line with international practices.  The HKMA will work with relevant authorities to further strengthen co-operative oversight arrangements where appropriate.
mt_raw: 金管局將與FMIs合作，確保其遵循PFMI，並按需要進行及更新相關評估。此外，金管局將繼續參與CPMI-IOSCO有關PFMI落實的監察及評估工作。金管局亦會參與國際標準制定組織的相關工作，並因應市場及科技發展，以及配合國際慣例，強化其監管要求。金管局亦會與相關機構合作，於適當情況下進一步加強協作監管安排。

src_raw: The revised capital standards set out in the Basel III Finalising Post-crisis Reforms of December 2017, the Minimum Capital Requirements for Market Risk of January 2019 (revised in February 2019), and the Targeted Revisions to the Credit Valuation Adjustment Risk Framework of July 2020, which are collectively referred to as the “Basel III final reform package”.  These revised capital standards set out the revised capital treatment of credit risk, market risk, credit valuation adjustment (CVA) risk and operational risk, introduce an output floor requirement, and enhance the leverage ratio framework.  Amendments to the Banking (Capital) Rules (BCR) are being prepared in consultation with the industry with a view to them taking effect from 1 July 2023 as minimum requirements (except for those on market risk and CVA risk2).
mt_raw: 2017年12月發佈的《巴塞爾III最終危機後改革》、2019年1月（2019年2月修訂）發佈的《市場風險最低資本要求》及2020年7月發佈的《針對信用估值調整（CVA）風險框架的重點修訂》，統稱為「巴塞爾III最終改革方案」。這些修訂後的資本標準涵蓋了信用風險、市場風險、信用估值調整（CVA）風險及營運風險的資本處理，並引入了輸出底線要求及加強槓桿比率框架。金管局正與業界磋商，準備修訂《銀行業（資本）規則》（BCR），目標是自2023年7月1日起作為最低要求生效（市場風險及CVA風險相關部分除外2）。

src_raw: New or revised disclosure requirements associated with the revised capital standards in the Basel III final reform package are mainly set out in the Pillar 33 Disclosure Requirements – Updated Framework and the Revisions to Market Risk Disclosure Requirements, published by the Basel Committee in December 2018 and November 2021 respectively.  The Basel Committee also published the Revisions to Leverage Ratio Disclosure Requirements in June 2019 amending the disclosure requirements for leverage ratio to address concerns regarding potential “window-dressing” (i.e. banks reducing the volumes of certain transactions around reporting dates to artificially inflate their leverage ratios for reporting and public disclosure).  Corresponding amendments to the Banking (Disclosure) Rules to implement these new or revised disclosure requirements are also being prepared, with a view to having them take effect in Hong Kong along the same timelines as their associated revised capital standards.
mt_raw: 與巴塞爾III最終改革方案下修訂資本標準相關的新或修訂披露要求，主要載於巴塞爾委員會於2018年12月及2021年11月分別發佈的《第三支柱披露要求—更新框架》及《市場風險披露要求修訂》。巴塞爾委員會亦於2019年6月發佈《槓桿比率披露要求修訂》，修訂槓桿比率的披露要求，以應對有關「粉飾」的潛在問題（即銀行在報告日附近減少某些交易量，以人為提高其槓桿比率作報告及公開披露）。金管局正準備相應修訂《銀行業（披露）規則》，以便這些新或修訂的披露要求能與相關資本標準修訂同步在香港生效。

src_raw: To reflect developments in regulatory requirements and international standards, the HKMA plans to update certain SPM modules, including those relevant to the implementation of the revised capital and disclosure standards in the Basel III final reform package, “Countercyclical Capital Buffer – Approach to its Implementation”, “Interest Rate Risk in the Banking Book”, “New Share Subscription and Share Margin Financing” and “Stress Testing”.  The HKMA will also continue to work on the revised SPM modules on “Code of Conduct” and “Reporting Requirements Relating to Authorized Institutions’ External Auditors under the Banking Ordinance”, with an aim to finalising the revisions within 2022. Consequential to the proposed amendments to the Banking (Exposure Limits) Rules, the related Code of Practice and SPM modules, e.g. CR-G-8 on “Large Exposures and Risk Concentrations” and CR-G-9 on “Exposures to Connected Parties”, will be updated accordingly.
mt_raw: 為反映監管要求及國際標準的發展，金管局計劃更新若干SPM章節，包括與巴塞爾III最終改革方案下修訂資本及披露標準實施相關的章節、「逆周期資本緩衝—實施方法」、「銀行賬簿利率風險」、「新股認購及股票孖展融資」及「壓力測試」。金管局亦會繼續修訂有關「行為守則」及「根據《銀行業條例》有關認可機構外部核數師的報告要求」的SPM章節，目標於2022年內完成修訂。因應《銀行業（風險承擔限額）規則》的建議修訂，相關實務守則及SPM章節（如CR-G-8「大型風險集中」及CR-G-9「關連人士風險承擔」）亦會作出相應更新。

src_raw: With strong merchandise exports, reviving domestic demand and a boost from the Government’s supportive policy measures, the Hong Kong economy resumed positive growth in 2021, reversing the contraction experienced during 2019 and 2020. The labour market also improved, and inflation remained moderate albeit having edged up. While economic recovery is expected to continue after the fifth wave of COVID-19 subsides, its strength and speed are subject to uncertainties and risks, especially those surrounding the pandemic and the path of US monetary policy normalisation.
mt_raw: 受惠於強勁的商品出口、復甦的本地需求及政府支持性政策措施的推動，香港經濟於2021年恢復正增長，扭轉了2019及2020年出現的收縮局面。勞動市場亦有所改善，通脹雖然略為上升，但仍屬溫和。儘管預期在第五波新冠疫情消退後，經濟復甦將會持續，其力度及速度仍受多項不確定因素及風險影響，特別是圍繞疫情及美國貨幣政策正常化路徑的相關因素。

src_raw: Driven by strong merchandise exports and improving domestic demand, the Hong Kong economy grew by 6.3% in 2021, ending the economic contraction in 2019 and 2020 (Table 1 and Chart 1).  Private consumption recovered, thanks to improved labour market conditions and a boost from the Government’s Consumption Voucher Scheme1. Overall investment spending also rebounded as the business environment and outlook improved2.  Externally, HongKong’s exports of goods saw strong growth for the whole year, in part supported by the continued global economic recovery.  Export of services recorded modest growth, reflecting active regional trade and cargo flows as well as stronger cross-border business and financial activities. Total imports rose appreciably, mainly because of greater domestic and re-export-induced demand.  On a net basis, external trade contributed positively to real gross domestic product (GDP) growth in 2021 (Chart 1) as total exports grew faster than imports.
mt_raw: 在強勁商品出口及本地需求改善的帶動下，香港經濟於2021年增長6.3%，結束了2019及2020年的經濟收縮（見表1及圖1）。私人消費因勞動市場狀況改善及政府消費券計劃的推動而回升。隨著營商環境及前景改善，整體投資開支亦見反彈。對外方面，香港全年貨物出口錄得強勁增長，部分受惠於全球經濟持續復甦。服務出口則錄得溫和增長，反映區內貿易及貨運流動活躍，以及跨境商業及金融活動增強。進口總額顯著上升，主要由於本地及再出口帶動的需求增加。淨計外貿方面，2021年外貿對實質本地生產總值（GDP）增長作出正面貢獻（見圖1），因出口總額增長快於進口。

src_raw: Inflationary pressures edged up but remained moderate during the year.  Netting out the effects of the Government’s one-off relief measures, the year-on-year underlying inflation rate3 picked up gradually to a mild 1.4% in December (Chart 2)4.  Prices of consumer items such as dining out, transport, clothing and footwear regained upward momentum as local consumption demand improved. Import prices also increased notably alongside bottlenecks in global supply chains and the surge in international energy and commodity prices.  By contrast, the housing component was a drag on overall inflation, reflecting the feed-through of the earlier decline in fresh-letting private residential rentals (Chart 2).  More broadly, slow growth in nominal wage and commercial rentals helped keep domestic business cost pressures in check.  For 2021 as a whole, the underlying and headline inflation rates5 stayed mild at 0.6% and 1.6% respectively.
mt_raw: 年內通脹壓力略為上升，但仍屬溫和。扣除政府一次性紓困措施的影響後，按年基礎計算的基本通脹率3於12月逐步回升至1.4%的溫和水平（見圖2）4。隨著本地消費需求改善，外出用膳、交通、服裝及鞋類等消費品價格重拾升勢。受全球供應鏈瓶頸及國際能源及商品價格急升影響，進口價格亦顯著上升。相反，住屋項目則拖累整體通脹，反映早前新租私人住宅租金下跌的滲透效應（見圖2）。更廣泛而言，名義工資及商業租金增長緩慢，有助將本地營商成本壓力維持在可控範圍內。2021年全年，基本及綜合通脹率5分別維持在0.6%及1.6%的溫和水平。

src_raw: Alongside the domestic economic recovery, the labour market improved in 2021.  After reaching a 17-year high of 7.2% in February, the unemployment rate declined visibly to 4.0% in December6 (Chart 3) and the decline was broad based across most economic sectors.  Overall labour demand strengthened gradually as reflected by a pick-up in total employment (Chart 3) and private sector vacancies, though they were still below their pre-pandemic peaks.  On the other hand, the labour force shrank slightly by 1.3% in December compared with a year earlier, partly due to a modest decline in the labour force participation rate. The year-on-year growth in nominal wage and labour earnings, while moderate, showed signs of acceleration in the first three quarters of 2021, reversing the trend of deceleration during 2019–2020.
mt_raw: 隨著本地經濟復甦，2021年勞動市場有所改善。失業率於2月升至17年高位7.2%後，至12月明顯回落至4.0%6（見圖3），大部分經濟行業均錄得廣泛改善。整體勞動需求逐步增強，反映於總就業人數（見圖3）及私營機構職位空缺的回升，惟仍未回復至疫情前高位。另一方面，勞動人口於12月按年輕微收縮1.3%，部分原因是勞動參與率略為下降。2021年前三季名義工資及勞動收入的按年增長雖屬溫和，但已見加快，扭轉了2019–2020年期間增長放緩的趨勢。

src_raw: The local stock market was broadly sluggish during the year, despite a continued rally in some major overseas equity markets (Chart 4).  Extending its rebound in late 2020, the Hang Seng Index rose to a high of 31,085 on 17 February 2021, but market sentiment had turned sharply negative since then owing to a host of factors, including concerns about the new COVID-19 virus variants, potential monetary policy tightening by major central banks and reduced inflows from southbound trading under Stock Connect7.  The Hang Seng Index closed the year at 23,398, down markedly by 14.1% from a year ago.
mt_raw: 本地股票市場全年表現整體疲弱，儘管部分主要海外股市持續上升（見圖4）。恒生指數於2020年底反彈後，於2021年2月17日升至31,085點高位，但其後市場氣氛因多項因素急劇轉差，包括對新冠病毒變種的憂慮、主要央行潛在收緊貨幣政策，以及「滬深港通」南向資金流入減少7。恒生指數全年收報23,398點，按年大幅下跌14.1%。

src_raw: The residential property market regained some upward momentum in the first half of 2021 alongside better economic prospects, but saw some consolidation in the second half amid weakened asset market sentiments (Chart 4).  Overall, housing prices and transaction volume still recorded an increase of 3.7% and 24.1% respectively in 2021. Household affordability also became even more stretched, partly reflecting reduced household income.  On the other hand, after going through sharp corrections in 2019 and 2020, the non-residential property markets generally improved, with prices and rentals of industrial properties generally rising to their pre-pandemic peaks, whereas those of retail and office spaces remained below their respective peaks.
mt_raw: 住宅物業市場於2021年上半年隨經濟前景改善而重拾升勢，但下半年因資產市場氣氛轉弱而出現整固（見圖4）。整體而言，2021年樓價及成交量分別上升3.7%及24.1%。住戶負擔能力進一步受壓，部分反映住戶收入減少。另一方面，非住宅物業市場經歷2019及2020年大幅調整後，整體有所改善，工業物業價格及租金普遍回升至疫情前高位，惟零售及寫字樓物業價格及租金仍低於各自高位。

src_raw: In early 2022, the fifth wave of local COVID-19 infections has exerted pressures on domestic economic activities. In response, the Government introduced the fifth and the sixth rounds of the Anti-epidemic Fund and additional countercyclical measures under the 2022–23 Budget to help support the economy.  The HKMA, together with the banking sector, also extended the Pre-approved Principal Payment Holiday Scheme to the end of October 2022.
mt_raw: 2022年初，第五波本地新冠疫情對本地經濟活動造成壓力。為應對此情況，政府推出了第五及第六輪防疫抗疫基金，以及2022–23年度財政預算案下的額外逆周期措施，以支援經濟。香港金融管理局聯同銀行業界，亦將「預先批核還息不還本」計劃延長至2022年10月底。

src_raw: For 2022 as a whole, economic recovery is expected to continue, albeit at a more moderate pace compared to 2021, partly reflecting the impact of the fifth wave of COVID-19, slower global economic growth, a less favourable base effect and US monetary policy normalisation.  The Government forecasts real GDP growth for 2022 to be in the range of 1–2% and the latest growth estimates by international organisations and private sector analysts averaged 1.1%.  That said, the strength and pace of the recovery are subject to a host of uncertainties and risks, especially those surrounding the pandemic, the Ukraine situation, and the path of US monetary policy normalisation.
mt_raw: 預計2022年全年經濟復甦將會持續，但增長步伐較2021年溫和，部分反映第五波疫情的影響、全球經濟增長放緩、基數效應減弱及美國貨幣政策正常化。政府預測2022年實質GDP增長介乎1–2%，而國際組織及私營機構分析員的最新增長預測平均為1.1%。然而，復甦的力度及速度仍受多項不確定因素及風險影響，特別是圍繞疫情、烏克蘭局勢及美國貨幣政策正常化路徑的相關因素。

src_raw: Alongside rising import prices and pandemic-induced logistics disruptions, inflationary pressures are expected to edge up in the near term, but should stay broadly in check owing to soft rentals and mild local labour cost pressures. Market consensus forecasts a headline inflation rate of 2.4% in 2022, while the Government projects the headline and underlying inflation rates to be 2.1% and 2.0% respectively. The fifth wave of local COVID-19 infections has exerted pressures on the labour market in early 2022, especially for contact-intensive sectors.  Further out, labour market conditions will depend on the pandemic developments and the pace of the domestic economic recovery.
mt_raw: 隨著進口價格上升及疫情導致物流受阻，短期內通脹壓力預期會略為上升，但由於租金疲弱及本地勞動成本壓力溫和，通脹應可大致受控。市場普遍預測2022年綜合通脹率為2.4%，而政府預計綜合及基本通脹率分別為2.1%及2.0%。2022年初，第五波本地新冠疫情對勞動市場造成壓力，特別是需要密切接觸的行業。展望未來，勞動市場狀況將取決於疫情發展及本地經濟復甦的步伐。

src_raw: The banking sector’s balance sheet grew by 1.9% in 2021. Driven by the economic recovery, total loans recorded a growth of 3.8% during the year, compared with 1.2% in 2020. terms: {'currency board arrangement': '貨幣發行局制度', 'exchange fund': '外匯基金', 'monetary base': '貨幣基礎', 'the exchange fund': '外匯基金', 'us dollar reserve': '美元儲備', 'monetary policy': '貨幣政策'}
src_raw: The overriding objective of Hong Kong’s monetary policy is currency stability.  This is defined as a stable external exchange value of Hong Kong’s currency, in terms of its exchange rate in the foreign-exchange market against the US dollar, within a band of HK$7.75–7.85 to US$1. The structure of the monetary system is characterised by Currency Board arrangements, requiring the Monetary Base to be at least 100% backed by US dollar reserves held in the Exchange Fund, and changes in the Monetary Base to be 100% matched by corresponding changes in US dollar reserves.
mt_raw: 香港貨幣政策的首要目標是維持貨幣穩定。這是指在外匯市場上，港元兌美元的匯率於7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內保持穩定。香港貨幣體系的結構以貨幣發行局制度為特點，要求貨幣基礎必須由外匯基金持有的美元儲備作100%支持，貨幣基礎的變動亦須與美元儲備的相應變動完全匹配。

src_raw: The stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate is maintained through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and the firm commitment by the HKMA to honour the Convertibility Undertakings (CUs).  With the HKMA standing ready to sell (or buy) Hong Kong dollars to (or from) banks in exchange for US dollars upon request at 7.75 (or 7.85) per US dollar, when the strong-side (or weak-side) CU is triggered, the Aggregate Balance will expand (or contract) to push down (or up) Hong Kong dollar interest rates that would help move the Hong Kong dollar back to within the Convertibility Zone of 7.75 to 7.85.
mt_raw: 港元匯率的穩定，通過自動利率調整機制及金管局堅定履行兌換承諾（CUs）得以維持。當強方（或弱方）兌換承諾被觸發時，金管局隨時準備按每美元7.75（或7.85）港元的匯率，應銀行要求向其賣出（或買入）港元兌換美元。此舉將令結餘總額擴大（或收縮），從而壓低（或推高）港元利率，協助港元匯率回復至7.75至7.85的兌換保證區間內。

src_raw: Driven by equity-related demand arising from fundraising activities and the southbound Stock Connects1, the Hong Kong dollar traded close to the strong-side CU at the beginning of the year.  Thereafter, the Hong Kong dollar weakened amid stock market correction and repatriation of initial public offering (IPO) proceeds by some newly listed firms before rebounding slightly in the second quarter due to corporates’ dividend payment needs and net inflows from the southbound Stock Connects.  Stepping into the second half of the year, while the Hong Kong dollar drifted lower amid softened equity market sentiment, it stayed mostly at the strong side of the Convertibility Zone and continued to trade in a smooth and orderly manner (Chart 1).  Overall, the Hong Kong dollar exchange market functioned normally throughout 2021.
mt_raw: 受股票集資活動及南向股票通1帶動的股票相關需求影響，年初港元匯率接近強方兌換承諾。其後，隨著股市調整及部分新上市公司將首次公開招股（IPO）所得款項匯回，港元轉弱，至第二季因企業派息需求及南向股票通的淨流入而略為回升。進入下半年，儘管股市氣氛轉淡，港元匯率略為下滑，但大部分時間仍處於兌換保證區間的強方，並繼續保持平穩有序交易（見圖一）。整體而言，2021年港元外匯市場運作正常。

src_raw: As the CUs were not triggered, the total of the Aggregate Balance and outstanding EFBNs remained virtually unchanged at around HK$1,526.3 billion in 2021 (Chart 2). During the year, the HKMA issued a total of HK$80 billion additional Exchange Fund Bills to meet the ongoing demand for Exchange Fund paper by banks amid the abundance of liquidity in the banking system, which led to a contraction of the Aggregate Balance from HK$457.5 billion at the end of 2020 to HK$377.5 billion at the end of 2021.
mt_raw: 由於兌換承諾未被觸發，2021年結餘總額及未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額基本維持在約15,263億港元（見圖二）。年內，金管局因銀行體系流動性充裕，為滿足銀行對外匯基金票據的持續需求，額外發行了800億港元外匯基金票據，導致結餘總額由2020年底的4,575億港元收縮至2021年底的3,775億港元。

src_raw: With the sizeable Aggregate Balance, the Hong Kong dollar interbank interest rates remained largely stable at low levels throughout the year (Chart 3).  While the demand for the Hong Kong dollar increased along with the IPO activities during the first quarter, Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates (HIBORs) of various tenors saw little fluctuations.  Thereafter, HIBORs remained largely stable despite concerns about the pace of US monetary tightening.  Towards the end of 2021, HIBORs witnessed mild pick-ups, partly reflecting anticipated funding needs towards the year end.  On the retail front, banks kept their Best Lending Rates unchanged.  Overall, Hong Kong’s money markets continued to function normally.  Discount Window borrowing decreased to HK$6.8 billion in 2021 from HK$9.1 billion in 2020.
mt_raw: 受結餘總額龐大影響，全年港元銀行同業拆息大致維持於低位穩定（見圖三）。首季隨IPO活動帶動港元需求上升，各期限的香港銀行同業拆息（HIBORs）波動不大。其後，儘管市場關注美國收緊貨幣政策的步伐，HIBORs仍大致穩定。至2021年底，HIBORs略為上升，部分反映年底資金需求預期。零售層面，銀行維持最優惠貸款利率不變。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借款由2020年的91億港元減至2021年的68億港元。

src_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) has been a strong anchor of Hong Kong’s financial system for more than three decades and has shown its strength and resilience to challenges.  Despite lingering uncertainties surrounding global economic recovery, the Hong Kong dollar exchange and money markets continued to function in an orderly manner, reflecting the robustness of the LERS.  The Government is firmly committed to the LERS.  In its 2021 External Sector Report, the International Monetary Fund once again reiterated that the credibility of the LERS has been assured by a transparent set of rules, ample fiscal and foreign reserves, strong financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy and a prudent fiscal framework.
mt_raw: 聯繫匯率制度（LERS）三十多年來一直是香港金融體系的堅實錨點，展現出其強大韌性和應對挑戰的能力。儘管全球經濟復甦前景仍存不確定性，港元外匯及貨幣市場仍然有序運作，反映聯繫匯率制度的穩健。政府對聯繫匯率制度堅定不移。國際貨幣基金組織於2021年《外部部門報告》中再次重申，聯繫匯率制度的可信度由一套透明規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融監管及審慎的財政框架所保障。

src_raw: A robust banking system is crucial to the normal functioning of the LERS.  Hong Kong’s banking sector continued to operate smoothly with liquidity positions and capitalisation faring very well by international standards.  To ensure resilience of the banking sector, the HKMA has been closely monitoring banks’ management of credit, liquidity and interest rate risks and stress-test results, and has maintained its supervisory efforts on bank lending.
mt_raw: 穩健的銀行體系對聯繫匯率制度的正常運作至關重要。香港銀行業流動性及資本充足率均達國際高標準，繼續平穩運作。為確保銀行體系的韌性，金管局密切監察銀行的信貸、流動性及利率風險管理和壓力測試結果，並持續加強對銀行貸款的監管。

src_raw: To improve transparency of the Currency Board Account, a specific portion of Exchange Fund assets has been allocated to back the Monetary Base since October 1998.  The Backing Ratio (defined as the Backing Assets divided by the Monetary Base) moved within a range of 109.8–110.5% during 2021, without touching the Upper or the Lower Trigger Level. The ratio closed at 110.2% on 31 December (Chart 4). Under the LERS, while specific Exchange Fund assets have been designated for the Backing Portfolio, all Exchange Fund assets are available to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate.  The ample financial resources of the Exchange Fund, together with the sound banking system, provide a powerful backstop to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.
mt_raw: 為提升貨幣發行局賬戶的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金資產中已劃撥特定部分作為貨幣基礎的支持。備用資產比率（即備用資產除以貨幣基礎）於2021年介乎109.8%至110.5%之間，未觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報110.2%（見圖四）。在聯繫匯率制度下，雖然已指定特定外匯基金資產作為備用資產組合，但所有外匯基金資產均可用以支持港元匯率。外匯基金充裕的財政資源，加上穩健的銀行體系，為香港貨幣及金融穩定提供強大後盾。

src_raw: The Currency Board Sub-Committee (CBC) of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee monitors and reviews issues relevant to monetary and financial stability in Hong Kong.  In 2021, the CBC considered issues, including an assessment of inflation in the US, implications of the US dollar depreciation on Hong Kong, assessment of the taper tantrum risk and its impact on Hong Kong, and understanding the influence of Mainland-related fund flows on monetary conditions in Hong Kong.  Records of the CBC’s discussions on these issues and reports on the Currency Board operations submitted to the CBC are published on the HKMA website.
mt_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會（CBC）負責監察及檢討與香港貨幣及金融穩定相關的議題。2021年，貨幣發行委員會審議了多項議題，包括美國通脹的評估、美元貶值對香港的影響、縮減恐慌（taper tantrum）風險的評估及其對香港的影響，以及了解與內地相關資金流動對香港貨幣狀況的影響。貨幣發行委員會就上述議題的討論紀錄，以及提交予委員會的貨幣發行機制運作報告，均已於香港金融管理局（HKMA）網站上公布。

src_raw: The EFBN Programme continued to operate smoothly. To meet the ongoing demand for Exchange Fund paper by banks amid the abundance of liquidity in the banking system, the HKMA issued a total of HK$80 billion additional Exchange Fund Bills in the second half of 2021.  The additional issuance resulted in a corresponding reduction of the Aggregate Balance.  At the end of 2021, the nominal amount of outstanding Exchange Fund papers stood at HK$1,148.6 billion (Table 2).
mt_raw: 外匯基金票據及債券計劃（EFBN計劃）繼續運作暢順。為應對銀行體系流動性充裕下銀行對外匯基金票據的持續需求，金管局於2021年下半年額外發行了800億港元的外匯基金票據。額外發行導致結餘總額（Aggregate Balance）相應減少。截至2021年底，未償還外匯基金票據及債券的名義金額為11,486億港元（見表2）。

src_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary and Financial Research (HKIMR)  maintained a steady research output in 2021 despite the ongoing pandemic.  During the year, the HKIMR released 30 working papers and held nine webinars, which encompassed a wide range of topics including monetary policy, banking stability, market microstructure and financial technology (fintech) development.  The HKIMR also organised an international conference and a webinar in hybrid format.
mt_raw: 香港金融研究院（HKIMR）於2021年在疫情持續下仍維持穩定的研究產出。年內，HKIMR發表了30份工作論文，並舉辦了九場網絡研討會，涵蓋貨幣政策、銀行穩定、市場微觀結構及金融科技（fintech）發展等多個範疇。HKIMR亦舉辦了一場國際會議及一場混合形式的網絡研討會。

src_raw: The 11th Annual International Conference on the Chinese Economy, titled On the Path to Common Prosperity: China’s Economic Development in Dual Circulation, was held on 11 November.  The conference discussed recent policy developments related to common prosperity, dual circulation, anti-monopoly regulations, property market, Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect and financial developments in the Greater Bay Area5.  Expert speakers also presented in-depth analyses on the impact of population ageing and the sustainability of social security funds, as well as China’s contribution to global financial stability and world economy.  The six different sessions of the conference attracted over 3,200 online and on-site viewers, totaling 5,900 views.
mt_raw: 第十一屆中國經濟國際年會以「邁向共同富裕之路：中國經濟在雙循環下的發展」為主題，於11月11日舉行。會議討論了與共同富裕、雙循環、反壟斷監管、房地產市場、跨境理財通及大灣區金融發展等相關的最新政策動向。專家講者亦就人口老齡化的影響、社會保障基金的可持續性，以及中國對全球金融穩定和世界經濟的貢獻等議題作出深入分析。會議六個不同環節共吸引超過3,200名線上及現場觀眾，總觀看人次達5,900。

src_raw: The banking sector in Hong Kong remained sound and stable in 2021, despite the emergence of more contagious COVID-19 variants, causing uncertainty to global economic recovery.  During the year, the HKMA remained focused on the supervision of authorized institutions’ risk management.  Supervision of authorized institutions’ operational and cyber resilience was also stepped up in light of escalating cyber threats and accelerating digitalisation in the banking sector.
mt_raw: 儘管出現了傳染性更強的 COVID-19 變異株，為全球經濟復甦帶來不確定性，香港銀行業於 2021 年仍然保持穩健和穩定。年內，香港金融管理局（HKMA）持續專注於授權機構的風險管理監管工作。鑑於銀行業網絡威脅日益加劇及數字化步伐加快，金管局亦加強了對授權機構營運及網絡韌性的監管。

src_raw: On conduct supervision, the HKMA provided guidance to banks to facilitate the use of non-face-to-face channels for distributing investment and insurance products, and worked with fellow regulators to formulate supervisory requirements on new products in the market such as insurance-linked securities and virtual assets.  The Code of Banking Practice was also revised to enhance consumer protection in digital financial services.
mt_raw: 在行為監管方面，金管局向銀行提供指引，促進利用非面對面渠道分銷投資及保險產品，並與其他監管機構合作，制定市場上新產品（如保險連結證券及虛擬資產）的監管要求。銀行業務守則亦已修訂，以加強數字金融服務的消費者保障。

terms: {'aml regtech lab': '反洗錢合規科技實驗室', 'aml / cft': '打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集', 'financial action task force': '財務行動特別組織', 'hkma': '金管局', 'regtech': '合規科技', 'associate': '聯營公司', 'financial crime': '金融罪行', 'illicit fund flow': '不法資金流動', 'information share': '訊息共享', 'mule account network': '傀儡戶口網絡', 'network analytics': '網絡分析', 'online fraud': '網上騙案', 'pandemic': '疫情', 'public - private partnership': '公私營夥伴關係', 'remote customer on - boarding': '遙距開戶'}
src_raw: In the area of anti-money laundering and counter-financing of terrorism (AML/CFT), the HKMA’s priority has been to further strengthen banks’ gatekeeper role in the ecosystem and their ability to prevent and detect illicit fund flows associated with increases in online fraud, mule account networks and other financial crimes during the pandemic.  To increase protection for customer accounts against fraud and financial crimes, the HKMA scaled up collaboration and information sharing with other stakeholders via public-private partnerships.  While supporting remote customer on-boarding, the HKMA also encouraged adoption of other technologies including network analytics through the launch of the first AML Regtech Lab in November.  Internationally, proactive engagement has kept the HKMA at the forefront of global AML/CFT efforts in the Financial Action Task Force.
mt_raw: 在反洗錢及打擊恐怖分子資金籌集（AML/CFT）方面，金管局的重點在於進一步強化銀行在生態系統中的守門人角色，以及其防範和偵測與疫情期間網上詐騙、騾子帳戶網絡及其他金融犯罪相關非法資金流動的能力。為加強對客戶帳戶免受詐騙及金融犯罪的保護，金管局透過公私營合作夥伴關係，擴大與其他持份者的協作及資訊共享。金管局在支持遙距客戶開戶的同時，亦鼓勵銀行採用包括網絡分析在內的其他技術，並於十一月推出首個 AML Regtech Lab（反洗錢監管科技實驗室）。在國際層面，金管局積極參與，持續處於金融行動特別工作組（FATF）全球 AML/CFT 工作的前沿。

src_raw: On the development front, the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect Pilot Scheme in the Guangdong–Hong Kong–Macao Greater Bay Area was launched smoothly in September.  During the year, the HKMA continued to execute its two-year roadmap for promoting Regtech adoption in Hong Kong.  Several initiatives were rolled out to lay the foundation for banks’ climate risk management and promote green and sustainable banking more broadly, as discussed in the Sustainability chapter. Further efforts were also made in the area of soft infrastructure, including promoting a customercentric corporate culture, as well as working with the banking industry to roll out capacity-building initiatives to facilitate talent development.
mt_raw: 在發展方面，粵港澳大灣區跨境理財通試點計劃於九月順利推出。年內，金管局繼續推行為期兩年的監管科技（Regtech）應用推廣路線圖。多項舉措已推出，為銀行的氣候風險管理奠定基礎，並更廣泛地推動綠色及可持續銀行業務，詳情見可持續發展章節。此外，金管局亦在軟基建方面作出進一步努力，包括推動以客為本的企業文化，並與銀行業合作推出能力建設計劃，以促進人才發展。

src_raw: Banks can affect the stability of the system through the way they carry out their businesses and, in extreme cases, by failing in a disorderly manner.  The Monetary Authority, as a supervisory authority, plays a key role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring that banks are resilient to shocks and able to recover their positions in crises, ultimately helping to prevent failures.  The Monetary Authority is responsible for the prudential supervision of banks and is tasked with the authorization of licensed banks, restricted licence banks and deposit-taking companies in Hong Kong, which are collectively known as authorized institutions (AIs).
mt_raw: 銀行可通過其業務運作方式影響體系穩定性，極端情況下甚至可能因無序倒閉而產生影響。作為監管機構，金管局在保障金融穩定方面發揮關鍵作用，確保銀行能夠抵禦衝擊並在危機中恢復其狀況，最終有助於防止銀行倒閉。金管局負責對銀行進行審慎監管，並負責授權香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱為授權機構，AIs）。

src_raw: However, the Monetary Authority cannot ensure, nor is the Hong Kong prudential regulatory framework designed to ensure, a zero-risk financial system.  Instead, the Monetary Authority, as a resolution authority, seeks to ensure that, in the event of an AI becoming non-viable, its failure can be managed in an orderly manner.  To this end, a resolution regime for financial institutions in Hong Kong has been established, under which the Monetary Authority is the resolution authority for AIs, among other types of institutions.  To operationalise the resolution regime in Hong Kong, it is important to lay down resolution rules and policy standards, undertake resolution planning to remove impediments to AIs’ resolvability and develop the HKMA’s operational capability to resolve a failing AI.  In order to carry out these tasks effectively, the HKMA adopts an internationally harmonised and co-ordinated approach.
mt_raw: 然而，金管局無法保證，也並非香港審慎監管框架的設計目標，去確保零風險的金融體系。相反，金管局作為處置機構，致力於確保當授權機構失去生存能力時，其倒閉能以有序方式處理。為此，香港已建立金融機構處置機制，金管局為授權機構等類型機構的處置機構。為在香港落實處置機制，必須制定處置規則及政策標準，開展處置規劃以消除授權機構可處置性的障礙，並提升金管局處置失敗授權機構的操作能力。為有效執行這些任務，金管局採取國際協調一致的方式。

src_raw: The Monetary Authority is also responsible for the designation and oversight of certain financial market infrastructures (FMIs). In overseeing FMIs, the HKMA aims to promote their general safety and efficiency, limit systemic risk and foster transparency.  Making FMIs more resilient to financial crises protects the monetary and financial systems in Hong Kong from possible destabilising effects arising from disruption to the FMIs.  Information regarding the HKMA’s oversight approach is available on the HKMA website.
mt_raw: 金管局亦負責指定及監督若干金融市場基礎設施（FMIs）。在監督 FMIs 時，金管局旨在促進其整體安全及效率，限制系統性風險並提升透明度。提升 FMIs 對金融危機的韌性，有助於保護香港的貨幣及金融體系免受 FMIs 中斷帶來的潛在破壞性影響。有關金管局監督方法的資訊可於金管局網站查閱。

src_raw: Apart from off-site activities, the HKMA conducted regular on-site examinations supplemented with thematic reviews on areas assessed to be of higher risk.  A total of 679 on-site examinations and thematic reviews were carried out during the year with credit risk management as a key focus. Amid growing adoption of technology by banks, management of operational risk and technology risk was another major area of attention.  The HKMA also increased the number of on-site examinations and thematic reviews targeting liquidity and market risk management.  In addition, specialist teams performed on-site examinations and thematic reviews of AIs’ activities in securities, investment products, insurance and mandatory provident fund (MPF)- related businesses, as well as their anti-money laundering and counter-financing of terrorism (AML/CFT) controls. Table 1 contains a summary of the HKMA’s supervisory activities in 2021.
mt_raw: 除非現場活動外，金管局還定期進行現場檢查，並就風險較高領域進行主題式審查。年內共進行 679 次現場檢查及主題式審查，重點關注信貸風險管理。隨著銀行日益採用科技，營運風險及科技風險管理亦成為另一主要關注範疇。金管局亦增加了針對流動性及市場風險管理的現場檢查及主題式審查次數。此外，專責團隊對授權機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強積金（MPF）相關業務，以及其反洗錢及打擊恐怖分子資金籌集（AML/CFT）控制進行了現場檢查及主題式審查。表 1 概述了金管局於 2021 年的監管活動。

src_raw: During the year, the COVID-19 pandemic continued to weigh on some sectors of the economy, while credit events in the Mainland property sector caught the attention of the market.  The HKMA enhanced the breadth and depth of its surveillance, with deep-dive reviews focused on banks’ exposures to highly leveraged borrowers. Close communication with banks has been maintained to facilitate up-to-date assessment of the impact of economic and market developments as well as the adequacy of banks’ risk management measures.  The overall credit risk facing the banking sector is assessed to be manageable.  The latest results of the HKMA’s solvency stress tests confirm that the banking sector continues to maintain sufficient capital buffers to withstand extreme stress.
mt_raw: 年內，2019冠狀病毒病（COVID-19）疫情持續對部分經濟行業造成壓力，而內地房地產行業的信貸事件亦引起市場關注。香港金融管理局（HKMA）加強了監察的廣度和深度，重點對銀行對高槓桿借款人的風險敞口進行深入審查。金管局與銀行保持緊密溝通，以便及時評估經濟及市場發展的影響，以及銀行風險管理措施的充足性。整體而言，銀行業面臨的信貸風險被評估為可控。金管局最新的償付能力壓力測試結果顯示，銀行業繼續維持足夠的資本緩衝，以承受極端壓力情景。

src_raw: In September, the HKMA and the Banking Sector Small and Medium-sized Enterprise (SME) Lending Coordination Mechanism announced a six-month extension of the Pre-approved Principal Payment Holiday Scheme until the end of April 2022.  This scheme was first launched in May 2020 to defer loan principal payments of eligible corporate customers by six months.  In light of a resurgence of local coronavirus infections, in February 2022, the scheme was further extended until the end of October 2022.  In addition, the scheme was enhanced to offer a one-year partial principal repayment option to those customers who are financially capable and willing to resume principal repayment gradually.
mt_raw: 9月，金管局與銀行業中小企業貸款協調機制宣布，將「預先批核還息不還本」計劃延長六個月至2022年4月底。該計劃於2020年5月首次推出，為合資格企業客戶的貸款本金還款延期六個月。鑑於本地新冠病毒感染個案再度上升，該計劃於2022年2月進一步延長至2022年10月底。此外，計劃亦作出優化，為有能力及願意逐步恢復還本的客戶，提供為期一年的部分還本選項。

src_raw: The successive rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures introduced by the HKMA since 2009 have strengthened banks’ risk management and the banking sector’s resilience to a possible abrupt downturn in the local property market.  The average loan-to-value (LTV) ratio of new residential mortgage loans (RMLs) approved in December 2021 was 53%, compared with 64% in September 2009 before the countercyclical measures were first introduced.  The average debt servicing ratio (DSR) of new mortgages remained low at 36% in December 2021, compared with 41% in August 2010, when a cap on DSR was first applied (Chart 1).
mt_raw: 自2009年以來，金管局陸續推出的逆周期宏觀審慎措施，已加強銀行的風險管理能力及銀行業對本地樓市可能急劇下行的抗逆力。2021年12月新批住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數（LTV）為53%，較2009年9月（即首次引入逆周期措施前）的64%為低。2021年12月新批按揭的平均供款與入息比率（DSR）維持在36%的低水平，較2010年8月（首次設有DSR上限時）的41%為低（見圖1）。

src_raw: In light of banks’ increasing reliance on technology to support their operations, the HKMA stepped up supervision of operational and technology risks.  Key supervisory focuses during the year included controls over cloud outsourcing and remote working arrangements.  The HKMA launched an industry consultation in December on a draft new Supervisory Policy Manual (SPM) module on “Operational Resilience”. The new SPM module seeks to provide guidance to banks on developing a holistic and integrated operational resilience framework.
mt_raw: 鑑於銀行日益依賴科技以支援營運，金管局加強了對營運及科技風險的監管。年內的主要監管重點包括對雲端外判及遙距工作安排的控制。金管局於12月就《營運韌性》新監管政策手冊（SPM）草案展開業界諮詢。新SPM旨在為銀行建立全面及整合的營運韌性框架提供指引。

src_raw: The HKMA closely monitored AIs’ progress in preparing for the transition away from the London Interbank Offered Rate (LIBOR).  It collaborated with industry associations and developed tools to assist AIs in supporting their customers’ migration to alternative reference rates, including a leaflet to raise corporates’ awareness of the transition and an information note on options available in the loan markets to replace US dollar LIBOR.  AIs have substantially remediated contracts referencing LIBOR settings which ceased to be published after the end of 2021.  They were reminded not to enter into new LIBOR contracts from 1 January 2022 onwards.
mt_raw: 金管局密切監察認可機構為過渡離開倫敦銀行同業拆息（LIBOR）所作的準備進展，並與業界協會合作，開發工具協助認可機構支援客戶轉用其他參考利率，包括向企業發放宣傳單張以提高其對過渡的認識，以及就貸款市場可取代美元LIBOR的選項發出資料簡報。認可機構已大致完成修訂參考LIBOR的合約，這些合約所參考的LIBOR設定已於2021年底後停止發布。金管局亦提醒認可機構自2022年1月1日起不得再簽訂新的LIBOR合約。

src_raw: On enhancing connectivity, significant progress was made during the year with the addition of the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect and Southbound Trading under Bond Connect to the suite of Connect schemes.  Thanks to its world-class market infrastructure and the Connect schemes, Hong Kong is the favoured platform for Mainland funds to tap into global markets and for international investors to access the fast-growing Mainland markets.
mt_raw: 在提升互聯互通方面，年內取得重大進展，新增了跨境理財通（Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect）及債券通南向交易（Southbound Trading under Bond Connect），進一步完善了「互聯互通」計劃組合。憑藉世界級的市場基礎設施及互聯互通機制，香港成為內地資金進軍全球市場的首選平台，同時亦是國際投資者進入高速增長的內地市場的首選渠道。

To promote Hong Kong’s financial services, the HKMA stepped up market outreach to overseas and Mainland stakeholders to keep them informed about the resilience of Hong Kong’s financial system and the prospects it presents.

src_raw: Hong Kong’s position as an offshore renminbi hub remained firm, with offshore renminbi businesses registering robust growth during the year.  Inflows into renminbi assets continued to gather pace as the inclusion of onshore securities in major financial market indices continued. Hong Kong plays an indispensable role in facilitating international investors’ increased allocation to renminbi assets, with the Mainland–Hong Kong Connect schemes being widely accepted as the channels of choice for international investors to access onshore capital markets. In 2021, daily turnover under Northbound Bond Connect increased 34% to around RMB25.8 billion.
mt_raw: 香港作為離岸人民幣樞紐的地位依然穩固，離岸人民幣業務於年內錄得強勁增長。隨著在主要金融市場指數中納入在岸證券，人民幣資產的資金流入持續加快。香港在協助國際投資者增加人民幣資產配置方面發揮不可或缺的作用，內地—香港互聯互通機制已廣泛成為國際投資者進入在岸資本市場的首選渠道。2021年，北向債券通日均成交額增長34%，達約2,580億元人民幣。

src_raw: Following the success of Northbound Bond Connect, Southbound Bond Connect was launched in September, completing the two-way connection between the Mainland and international bond markets.  In the same month, the People’s Bank of China (PBoC), the HKMA and the Monetary Authority of Macao promulgated the implementation details for the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect (Crossboundary WMC) Scheme in the Guangdong–Hong Kong– Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA).  In October, eligible banks in Hong Kong started providing Cross-boundary WMC services together with their Mainland partner banks.
mt_raw: 繼北向債券通取得成功後，南向債券通於9月推出，實現了內地與國際債券市場的雙向連接。同月，中國人民銀行（PBoC）、金管局及澳門金融管理局公布了粵港澳大灣區（GBA）跨境理財通（Cross-boundary WMC）實施細則。10月，香港合資格銀行與內地合作銀行一同開展跨境理財通服務。

src_raw: To enhance Hong Kong’s role as a key offshore renminbi centre, a working group comprising the HKMA, the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) and Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited (HKEX) was formed to conduct a feasibility study on promoting trading of renminbi-denominated equity securities in Hong Kong.  A joint seminar was also co-organised by the PBoC and the HKMA in December, showcasing Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre and a leading renminbi business hub.
mt_raw: 為加強香港作為離岸人民幣中心的角色，由金管局、證券及期貨事務監察委員會（SFC）及香港交易及結算所有限公司（HKEX）組成的工作小組，開展了推動在港交易人民幣計價股票的可行性研究。12月，人民銀行與金管局聯合舉辦研討會，展示香港作為國際金融中心及領先人民幣業務樞紐的地位。

src_raw: The HKMA continues to make progress towards strengthening the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform.  In particular, to increase Hong Kong’s appeal as a preferred fund domicile, the HKMA worked closely with the Government and the financial industry to provide a more facilitating tax and regulatory environment for fund formation.  Significant strides were also made in further elevating Hong Kong’s position as a regional green and sustainable finance hub, and as a bond issuance centre. At the same time, the HKMA stepped up market outreach to promote Hong Kong’s financial services to overseas and Mainland stakeholders.
mt_raw: 金管局持續推進加強香港金融平台競爭力的工作。特別是為提升香港作為基金註冊地的吸引力，金管局與政府及金融業界緊密合作，為基金設立提供更有利的稅務及監管環境。在進一步提升香港作為區域綠色及可持續金融樞紐及債券發行中心方面亦取得重大進展。同時，金管局加強市場推廣，向海外及內地持份者推廣香港金融服務。

src_raw: Safe and efficient operation of financial infrastructure is fundamental for reinforcing Hong Kong’s position as a leading international financial centre.  In 2021, the four interbank Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) systems, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU) and the Hong Kong Trade Repository achieved 100%1 system availability, outperforming the target of 99.95%.  Following the launch of Southbound Bond Connect in September, the CMU became the settlement and custodian service provider for transactions conducted under both Northbound and Southbound Bond Connect.
mt_raw: 金融基礎設施的安全及高效運作，是鞏固香港作為國際金融中心地位的基石。2021年，四個銀行間實時全額結算系統（RTGS）、中央結算系統（CMU）及香港交易報告庫全年系統可用率達100%，超越99.95%的目標。隨著9月南向債券通啟動，CMU成為北向及南向債券通交易的結算及託管服務提供者。

src_raw: Adoption of the FPS continued to expand in 2021. The number of registrations grew to 9.6 million at the end of 2021 and the average daily turnover for the year rose by 90% from 2020.  Increased use of the FPS for settling Government bills, making merchant payments and topping up stored value facility (SVF) e-wallets or bank accounts were the key drivers for the continued rise in transaction volume, on top of a steady growth in person-to-person and business payments.
mt_raw: 2021年，FPS的應用持續擴展。至年底，登記數目增至960萬，全年日均交易額較2020年上升90%。政府賬單繳付、商戶支付及增值儲值支付工具（SVF）電子錢包或銀行賬戶的使用增加，是交易量持續上升的主要動力，此外，個人對個人及商業支付亦保持穩定增長。

src_raw: Internationally, the HKMA is an active member of the central banking community and plays a leadership role in a number of regional and international committees.  For example, the HKMA chairs the Working Group on Financial Markets (WGFM) established under the Executives’ Meeting of East Asia-Pacific Central Banks (EMEAP)2.  The HKMA also co-chairs the Policy and Standards Group of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (Basel Committee), the Non-Bank Monitoring Experts Group and the Financial Innovation Network of the Financial Stability Board (FSB), and leads a team that looks into supervisory issues associated with financial benchmark transition.
mt_raw: 在國際層面，金管局是中央銀行界的活躍成員，並在多個地區及國際委員會中擔當領導角色。例如，金管局擔任東亞及太平洋地區中央銀行行長會議（EMEAP）下設金融市場工作小組（WGFM）主席。金管局亦聯合主持巴塞爾銀行監管委員會（Basel Committee）政策及標準小組、非銀行監測專家小組及金融穩定委員會（FSB）金融創新網絡，並領導一個專責金融基準轉換監管議題的團隊。

src_raw: To support the “All banks go fintech” initiative of the “Fintech 2025” strategy, the HKMA rolled out the Tech Baseline Assessment in June 2021.  The assessment aims to help the HKMA develop a better understanding of the current fintech landscape in the banking sector, and identify which fintech areas may warrant the HKMA’s support.  All licensed banks with significant operations in Hong Kong were requested to develop a three-year plan for fintech adoption by the end of 2021.
mt_raw: 為配合「金融科技2025」策略下的「全行走向金融科技」倡議，金管局於2021年6月推出了科技基線評估（Tech Baseline Assessment）。該評估旨在協助金管局更好地了解銀行業目前的金融科技發展狀況，並識別哪些金融科技領域值得金管局提供支持。所有在香港有重要業務的持牌銀行均被要求於2021年底前制定三年金融科技應用計劃。

src_raw: The HKMA and the Bank of Thailand expanded the scope of their joint research project with the joining of the Central Bank of the United Arab Emirates and the Digital Currency Institute of the PBoC in February 2021.  Renamed as “Multiple Central Bank Digital Currency Bridge (mBridge)” and strongly supported by the Bank for International Settlements (BIS) Innovation Hub Centre in Hong Kong, the project further explores the capabilities of distributed ledger technology to facilitate real-time cross-border foreign exchange payment-versus-payment (PvP) transactions in a multi-jurisdictional context and on a 24/7 basis.  A joint report was published in September to deliver the interim findings, followed by the publication of potential use cases and a future roadmap in November.
mt_raw: 金管局與泰國銀行於2021年2月擴大了雙方的聯合研究項目，阿聯酋中央銀行及中國人民銀行數字貨幣研究所亦加入合作。該項目更名為「多國央行數字貨幣橋（mBridge）」，並獲得國際清算銀行（BIS）創新中心（香港中心）的大力支持。該項目進一步探索分布式帳本技術（DLT）在多司法管轄區及全天候（24/7）環境下，促進實時跨境外匯付款對付款（PvP）交易的能力。9月發表了聯合報告，公布中期研究成果，11月則發布了潛在應用場景及未來路線圖。

src_raw: To future-proof Hong Kong in terms of CBDC readiness, the HKMA started a study on the prospect of issuing retail CBDC in Hong Kong, i.e. e-HKD, covering both technical and policy considerations.  In collaboration with the BIS Innovation Hub Centre in Hong Kong, the HKMA embarked on a study called Project Aurum to explore the technical aspect of issuing retail CBDC.  Separately, an internal cross-departmental working group was set up to study the relevant technical, policy and legal issues.  In October, the HKMA released a technical white paper titled e-HKD: A technical perspective to explore and invite comments on potential technical design options for issuing and distributing retail CBDC.
mt_raw: 為使香港在中央銀行數字貨幣（CBDC）方面具備前瞻性準備，金管局展開了有關在香港發行零售型CBDC（即e-HKD）的研究，涵蓋技術及政策層面。金管局與國際清算銀行創新中心（香港中心）合作，開展了名為「Aurum計劃」的研究，探討發行零售型CBDC的技術層面。此外，金管局亦成立了跨部門工作小組，研究相關技術、政策及法律議題。10月，金管局發表了技術白皮書《e-HKD：技術視角》，探討並徵詢對發行及分發零售型CBDC潛在技術設計方案的意見。

src_raw: In July, the HKMA hosted a virtual symposium to encourage banks and SVF operators to join the CDI, a next-generation financial data infrastructure that aims to enable more efficient financial intermediation in the banking system.  To further facilitate development and adoption, the launch of the CDI Innovation Hub was announced during the symposium. To facilitate small and medium-sized enterprise (SME) financing, the HKMA completed two phases of proof-of-concept study examining the technical feasibility of the CDI.  Applying alternative data to facilitate credit assessment and the underwriting of loans, more than 550 SME loans exceeding HK$900 million in total were approved by the participating banks during the study.  Based on the encouraging results, the HKMA announced the pilot launch of the CDI in November.
mt_raw: 7月，金管局舉辦了線上研討會，鼓勵銀行及儲值支付工具（SVF）營運商加入商業數據互通平台（CDI），這是一個新一代金融數據基礎設施，旨在促進銀行體系內更高效的金融中介服務。為進一步推動發展及應用，金管局於研討會上宣布啟動CDI創新中心。為促進中小企業（SME）融資，金管局完成了兩階段的概念驗證研究，檢視CDI的技術可行性。通過應用替代數據以促進信貸評估及貸款承保，參與銀行於研究期間共批出超過550宗、總額逾9億港元的中小企貸款。基於令人鼓舞的結果，金管局於11月宣布CDI試點啟動。

src_raw: To expand the fintech talent pool, the HKMA continued to run the Fintech Career Accelerator Scheme 2.0 in collaboration with its strategic partners3 to nurture young talent at various stages of their career development. More than 180 students benefitted from the scheme in 2021. Separately, the Industry Project Masters Network scheme was piloted in September to provide opportunities for master’s degree students majoring in fintech to work on real-life fintech projects.  To form strategic partnerships and foster collaboration in areas including fintech talent development, the HKMA entered into memorandums of understanding (MoUs) with four local universities in October.
mt_raw: 為擴大金融科技人才庫，金管局繼續與策略夥伴合作推行「金融科技人才培育計劃2.0」（Fintech Career Accelerator Scheme 2.0），在不同職業發展階段培育年輕人才。2021年超過180名學生受惠於該計劃。此外，金管局於9月試行「產業項目碩士網絡計劃」（Industry Project Masters Network scheme），為主修金融科技的碩士生提供參與實際金融科技項目的機會。為建立策略夥伴關係及促進包括金融科技人才發展在內的合作，金管局於10月與四所本地大學簽署了合作備忘錄（MoUs）。

src_raw: The use of Fintech Supervisory Sandbox (FSS) continued to rise during the year.  As of end-December 2021, a total of 234 pilot trials of fintech initiatives had been allowed in the FSS since its launch in 2016, compared with 193 as of end-2020.  As of end-December 2021, the HKMA had also received in total 666 requests to access the FSS Chatroom for supervisory feedback at the early stage of fintech projects since the introduction of the Chatroom in 2017.  Over 63% of the Chatroom requests were made by technology firms (tech firms) .
mt_raw: 年內，金融科技監管沙盒（FSS）的使用持續增加。截至2021年12月底，自2016年推出以來，FSS共批准了234項金融科技創新試點，較2020年底的193項有所增加。截至2021年12月底，自2017年設立FSS Chatroom以來，金管局共收到666宗進入Chatroom以獲取監管反饋的申請，其中超過63%來自科技公司（tech firms）。

src_raw: The global financial markets embarked on a recovery path in 2021.  Although the global economy continued to be affected by the evolving COVID-19 pandemic situation, a number of factors, including an increasing vaccination rate as well as accommodative monetary policies and fiscal measures around the world, have contributed to notable recovery in the global economy and financial markets.  Against this background, a number of overseas equity markets achieved record highs during the year, and the Exchange Fund’s overall equity holdings were able to achieve a decent return despite the sluggish performance in Hong Kong equities. During 2021, the Exchange Fund recorded an investment income of HK$191.9 billion, representing an investment return of 4.1%.
mt_raw: 2021年，全球金融市場開始走上復甦之路。儘管全球經濟仍受新冠疫情持續變化的影響，但多項因素，包括疫苗接種率上升，以及全球寬鬆的貨幣政策和財政措施，均促使全球經濟及金融市場顯著復甦。在此背景下，多個海外股票市場於年內創下歷史新高，儘管香港股票表現疲弱，外匯基金的整體股票持倉仍錄得不俗回報。2021年，外匯基金錄得投資收入1,919億港元，投資回報率為4.1%。

src_raw: The Exchange Fund’s primary objective, as laid down in the Exchange Fund Ordinance, is to affect, either directly or indirectly, the exchange value of the currency of Hong Kong.  The Fund may also be used to maintain the stability and integrity of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems to help maintain Hong Kong as an international financial centre.  The HKMA, under the delegated authority of the Financial Secretary and within the terms of the delegation, is responsible to the Financial Secretary for the use and investment management of the Exchange Fund.
mt_raw: 根據《外匯基金條例》，外匯基金的主要目標是直接或間接影響香港貨幣的匯率。基金亦可用於維持香港貨幣及金融體系的穩定和完整，協助鞏固香港作為國際金融中心的地位。香港金融管理局（HKMA）在財政司司長授權及授權條件下，負責向財政司司長匯報外匯基金的運用及投資管理。

src_raw: Broadly speaking, the Exchange Fund has two major portfolios: the Backing Portfolio (BP) and the Investment Portfolio (IP).  The BP holds highly liquid US dollardenominated assets to provide full backing to the Monetary Base as required under the Currency Board arrangements. The IP invests primarily in the bond and equity markets of the member economies of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development to preserve the value and long-term purchasing power of its assets.
mt_raw: 大致而言，外匯基金設有兩大主要投資組合：外匯基金票據組合（Backing Portfolio, BP）及投資組合（Investment Portfolio, IP）。BP持有高流動性的美元資產，以根據貨幣發行局制度的要求，為貨幣基礎提供全額支持。IP則主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織（OECD）成員經濟體的債券及股票市場，以保值及維持資產的長遠購買力。

src_raw: To better manage risks and enhance returns in the medium and long term, the HKMA diversifies part of the Exchange Fund’s investments in a prudent and incremental manner into a wider variety of asset classes.  This includes emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate.  Emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities are held under the IP, while private equity and real estate investments are held under the Long-Term Growth Portfolio (LTGP).  The HKMA has put in place a cap1 to guide the pace of diversification into the LTGP since its inception.  As the LTGP has become increasingly mature in investment scale and asset diversity, the EFAC decided in January 2022 to replace the cap by a target asset allocation that is determined concurrently with that of other asset classes, subject to prudent risk management principles.
mt_raw: 為更有效管理風險及提升中長期回報，金管局審慎並逐步將部分外匯基金投資多元化至更廣泛的資產類別，包括新興市場及內地債券和股票、私募股權（包括基礎設施）及房地產。新興市場及內地債券和股票納入IP持有，而私募股權及房地產投資則納入長遠增長組合（Long-Term Growth Portfolio, LTGP）。自LTGP設立以來，金管局一直設有上限以指導多元化步伐。隨著LTGP在投資規模及資產多元化方面日益成熟，EFAC於2022年1月決定以與其他資產類別同步釐定的目標資產配置取代上限，並以審慎的風險管理原則為前提。

src_raw: The investment process of the Exchange Fund is underpinned by decisions on two types of asset allocation: the strategic asset allocation and the tactical asset allocation.  The strategic asset allocation, reflected in the investment benchmark, represents long-term asset allocation given the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund.  Guided by the strategic allocation, assets are tactically allocated in an attempt to achieve an excess return over the benchmark.  This means the actual allocation is often different from the benchmark (or strategic) allocation. The differences between the actual and benchmark allocations are known as “tactical deviations”.  While the benchmark and tracking error4 limit are determined by the Financial Secretary in consultation with the EFAC, tactical decisions and allowable ranges for tactical deviations are made and set by the HKMA under delegated authority.  Within the ranges allowed for tactical deviations, portfolio managers may assume positions to take advantage of short-term market movements (Figure 2).
mt_raw: 外匯基金的投資流程以兩類資產配置決策為基礎：策略性資產配置及戰術性資產配置。策略性資產配置反映於投資基準，代表根據外匯基金投資目標而訂立的長期資產配置。在策略性配置指引下，資產會進行戰術性配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。這意味著實際配置往往與基準（或策略性）配置有所不同。實際配置與基準配置的差異稱為「戰術偏離」。基準及追蹤誤差4上限由財政司司長諮詢EFAC後釐定，戰術決策及戰術偏離的容許範圍則由金管局在授權下制定。在容許的戰術偏離範圍內，投資組合經理可因應短期市場變動作出部署（見圖2）。

src_raw: The growing complexity of the investment environment underlines the importance of risk management.  The HKMA sets stringent controls and investment guidelines for both internally and externally managed portfolios, and ensures a proper risk monitoring and compliance system is in place. Three lines of defence are in place to implement effective risk management and governance of investment-related activities.  Key risk categories (including credit, market, liquidity and operational risks) are regularly monitored, and the risk management process provides a robust framework to support strategic planning and investment diversification.
mt_raw: 投資環境日益複雜，突顯風險管理的重要性。金管局為內部及外部管理的投資組合訂立嚴格的控制措施及投資指引，並確保設有妥善的風險監控及合規系統。金管局設有三道防線，以有效實施投資相關活動的風險管理及管治。主要風險類別（包括信貸、巿場、流動性及營運風險）均定期監控，風險管理流程為策略規劃及投資多元化提供穩健框架。

src_raw: The HKMA believes that, by putting an appropriate emphasis on responsible investment and sustainable long-term economic performance, it can better achieve the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund and reduce risks associated with environmental, social and governance (ESG)- related matters of its underlying investments.  The HKMA supports responsible investment by integrating ESG factors into the investment processes for both public and private market investments of the Exchange Fund, underpinned by the guiding principle that priority will generally be given to ESG investments if the long-term risk-adjusted return is comparable with other investments.  For more details about the HKMA’s responsible investment framework and implementation, see the Sustainability chapter on pages 184 to 191.
mt_raw: 金管局認為，適當重視責任投資及可持續長遠經濟表現，有助更好地實現外匯基金的投資目標，並降低與環境、社會及管治（ESG）相關事項的潛在風險。金管局支持責任投資，將ESG因素納入外匯基金公私營市場投資流程，並以長遠風險調整回報與其他投資相若時，原則上優先考慮ESG投資。關於金管局責任投資框架及實施詳情，請參閱第184至191頁的「可持續發展」章節。

src_raw: The Exchange Fund recorded an investment income of HK$191.9 billion in 2021. src_raw: Corporate functions support the operation of the HKMA with a high level of transparency, accountability, efficiency and professionalism.  To facilitate public understanding about its policies and operations, the HKMA maintains effective communication with the community and the market through traditional and social media, its website, the Information Centre and other channels. mt_raw: 企業職能以高度的透明度、問責性、效率及專業精神支援香港金融管理局（HKMA）的運作。為促進公眾對其政策及運作的了解，金管局透過傳統及社交媒體、網站、資訊中心及其他渠道，與社會及市場保持有效溝通。在機構內部，金管局有意識地建立一支靈活及可持續發展的人才隊伍，實施嚴謹的財務紀律，並提升資訊科技能力，以適應變化並確保政策及措施的有效推行。

src_raw: The HKMA works closely with the media to enhance transparency and promote public understanding of its policies and operations.  In 2021, the HKMA held or participated in 169 physical and virtual events, comprising eight press conferences, eight stand-up interviews and 153 other public functions. A further 27 media interviews were arranged.  A total of 632 bilingual press releases were issued over the course of the year and a large number of media enquiries were handled on a daily basis.
mt_raw: 金管局與媒體緊密合作，以提升透明度並促進公眾對其政策及運作的認識。2021年，金管局舉辦或參與了169場實體及虛擬活動，包括8場記者會、8場即場訪問及153項其他公開活動，另安排了27次媒體專訪。全年共發佈了632份雙語新聞稿，並每日處理大量媒體查詢。

src_raw: To engage and interact with the public in a timely manner, the HKMA maintains five social media channels (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter and YouTube) with over 80,000 followers. src_raw: The Public Enquiry Service provides an effective means for the public to better understand key HKMA functions and operations.  During 2021, it handled 9,781 enquiries. About half of them were related to banking policies and regulations, consumer banking issues, notes and coins, as well as financial infrastructure and debt market development. Some of the notable enquiries were about the Coin Collection Programme, banking products and services, banking-related guidelines and circulars and the Retail Bond Issuance Programme.
mt_raw: 公眾查詢服務為市民更好地了解金管局的主要職能及運作提供有效途徑。2021年共處理9,781宗查詢，約半數涉及銀行政策及規管、消費者銀行事宜、紙幣及硬幣，以及金融基建及債券市場發展。部分較受關注的查詢包括硬幣收集計劃、銀行產品及服務、銀行相關指引及通告，以及零售債券發行計劃。
